---
name: "Feedback — Correction"
about: "The kit said X, but actually Y. Help us fix wrong, stale, or misleading guidance."
title: "feedback:correction — <one-line summary>"
labels: ["feedback", "feedback:correction"]
---

## Where in the kit
File or section: <e.g. `docs/SESSION-PLAYBOOK.md` § "Cadence rules">

## What it said
Quote or paraphrase the kit's instruction:
> 

## What actually happened
Concrete situation. Include error messages verbatim where applicable.

## Proposed fix
A specific change — exact wording, file path, or "add a note about X."

## Severity
- [ ] Blocking — I couldn't make progress until I figured it out
- [ ] Slowed me down — eventually unblocked
- [ ] Minor — just confusing

## Notes (optional)
Anything else useful for the maintainer.
